ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-30-2020 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Continued To Nov-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No Appearances:
The clerk notes message received from Law Offices of Charles Drexler (Eva), stating Mr. Drexler is unable to appear in person or via court call due to the fire and power outage situation.

The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to November 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for counsel to provide additional information on how to move forward.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Continued To Aug-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Drexel for Luisa Blue.

The Court that it needs either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration and a final inventory. Mr. Drexel stated that he has a fully executed status report with him, that he was not able to electronically file it and that they only have a partial inventory and appraisal. The Court informed Mr. Drexel that he needs to file a petition for approval of the status report that is fully noticed and compliance. Status on close of estate is continued to August 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The petition, and the inventory and appraisal are to be filed no later than August 21st.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Charles Drexler for Petitioner via CourtCall

Mr. Drexler stated that he filed a declaration yesterday, and that both petitioners want to waive bond. The Court noted that it needs the forms signed by the petitioners and item #4 to be properly filled out. The Court denies Mr. Drexler's request to grant the petition today, subject to filing of form DE-142. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to July 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Continued To Jul-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
